creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
you're really confused, what is that linux you're talking about? this here is freebsd, right? 

seems what you're looking for is a reason not to do what you should do, what in my opinion is making things work, as I told you, this cards are widely in use and as new on the market, so probably not the wisest thing simply dropping support, most likely there are other cards which are dead long time and nobody would be missing the driver 

the xf86-nv drv isn't working long time, I never tried again, I believe nouveau also not, whatsoever, having the driver loaded at boot is necessary for servers to get a proper console font resolution
